summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SnapAlign ecommerce platform. Backend APIs mostly functional with 86.4% success rate. Frontend UI working well with proper navigation, search, filtering, and authentication flow. Found authentication middleware issues and minor status code problems.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests
critical_bugs.impact: Auth middleware not properly protecting endpoints

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 200 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests

minor_issues.impact: Incorrect HTTP status code for resource creation

integration_issues.issue: Test session cookie authentication not working for admin access

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, categories, and featured products
Navigation bar with all required links working
Search functionality returns correct results (3 products for 'cable')
Category filtering works (2 products in Chargers category)
Product detail page loads with reviews section
Authentication redirects to Google OAuth correctly
Cart operations work for authenticated users
Admin stats and product management endpoints working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication middleware to properly return 401 for unauthenticated requests on protected endpoints (/api/auth/me, /api/cart). Update product creation endpoint to return 201 status code. Investigate admin dashboard authentication flow for proper session handling.
